checks.description: Oracle 19c must enable audit_trail to DB, XML, or OS
Oracle 19c must enable unified audit syslog
Oracle 19c must have unified auditing enabled
Oracle 19c REMOTE_LOGIN_PASSWORDFILE must be set to EXCLUSIVE
Oracle 19c user tablespaces must be encrypted (TABLESPACE_ENCRYPTION)
Oracle 19c must encrypt new tablespaces by default
Oracle 19c must enforce case-sensitive passwords
Oracle 19c must not have FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c must not have PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c must not have PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c must not have PASSWORD_REUSE_MAX set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c must not have PASSWORD_REUSE_TIME set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c PASSWORD_GRACE_TIME must be 7 days or less in all profiles
Oracle 19c must have PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION defined for all profiles
Oracle 19c must not have IDLE_TIME set to UNLIMITED in any profile
Oracle 19c SEC_MAX_FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS must be 5 or less
Oracle 19c OS_AUTHENT_PREFIX must be set to an empty string
Oracle 19c REMOTE_OS_AUTHENT must be set to FALSE
Oracle 19c REMOTE_OS_ROLES must be set to FALSE
Oracle 19c SQL92_SECURITY must be set to TRUE
Oracle 19c listener must use SECURE_REGISTER to prevent TNS listener hijacking
Oracle 19c listener must have ADMIN_RESTRICTIONS enabled
Oracle 19c must require network encryption (SQLNET.ENCRYPTION_SERVER=REQUIRED)
Oracle 19c must require crypto checksums (SQLNET.CRYPTO_CHECKSUM_SERVER=REQUIRED)
Oracle 19c must use AES256 for network encryption algorithm
